title: Sakura Blossoms
description: Changes the color of the particles from the Spore Blossom to be pink ✨
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/luavixen/SakuraBlossoms/main/screenshots/header.png)
# Sakura Blossoms for Minecraft
Simple and tiny Minecraft Fabric mod that changes the color of the particles from the Spore Blossom to be pink. Finally.
